title: Our Cassata
excerpt: Ingredients Cassata 1 Swiss roll 750 ml cream 125 ml castor sugar 5 ml vanilla essence 100 ml finely chopped glacé cherries 100 ml finely chopped nuts of your choice Sauce 250 ml cream 4 x 80 g whole-nut chocolate slabs Strawberries Method Line a bowl with cling wrap and set aside. html:
Ingredients

Cassata

  • 1 Swiss roll
  • 750 ml cream
  • 125 ml castor sugar
  • 5 ml vanilla essence
  • 100 ml finely chopped glacé cherries
  • 100 ml finely chopped nuts of your choice

Sauce

  • 250 ml cream
  • 4 x 80 g whole-nut chocolate slabs
  • Strawberries

Method

Line a bowl with cling wrap and set aside. Cut the Swiss roll into slices and line the bowl with them.

In a separate bowl, whip the cream and castor sugar to soft-peak stage and stir in the vanilla, cherries and nuts. Spoon the cream mixture into the Swiss roll base and cover with cling wrap. Place in the freezer until frozen.

Meanwhile, make the sauce by melting the chocolate and cream in the microwave.

Turn the cassata out onto a nice serving platter and pour the chocolate sauce over the cassata.

Serve immediately with strawberries.

Easy!
